svg.aria-label: Three copies of the work — where the backup lived.

svg.text: We built three copies of the distribution pipeline.

text.style: font-family: Georgia, serif; font-size: 17px; fill: #c9d1d9; opacity: 0.8; font-style: italic;
font-family: Georgia, serif; font-size: 14px; fill: #c9d1d9; opacity: 0.55; font-style: italic;

svg.text: Good distribution systems create redundancy you don't plan for.
